title: Seasons Federal Credit Union ransomware incident

extortion.description: Montage Marketing Services is an outsourced contact center specializing in handling peak activity periods and supporting back-office needs through their Customer Contact Center, Custom Fulfillment Center, and Administrative Services.We will upload 17gb of corporate documents soon. Employee and customer information, w-9 forms, contracts and agreements, confidential files, accounting and financial documents, HR files, NDA, etc.
